zh.lifeSummary: 當William lukyn於大約1530年出生在英國艾可格亞特 巴多福時，他的父親Geoffrey LUKYN23歲，母親Margaret Matilda FINCH12歲。他於1559年6月29日與Thomasin Walter在英國艾可馬申波利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1575年2月8日在英國艾可享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William lukyn于大约1530年出生在英国艾可格亞特 巴多福时，他的父亲Geoffrey LUKYN23岁，母亲Margaret Matilda FINCH12岁。他于1559年6月29日与Thomasin Walter在英国艾可馬申波利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1575年2月8日在英国艾可享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: lukyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German (Lüken): see Lueken . This surname is also found in the Netherlands.

variants.name: Lueken
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Alois, Behrend, Eckhart, Othmar.
North German (Lüken): patronymic from Lüke, see Lueke . The surname Lüken is also found in the Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When William lukyn was born about 1530, in Great Baddow, Essex, England, his father, Geoffrey LUKYN, was 23 and his mother, Margaret Matilda FINCH, was 12. He married Thomasin Walter on 29 June 1559, in Mashbury, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 8 February 1575, in Essex, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William lukyn est né environ 1530, à Great Baddow, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey LUKYN, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret Matilda FINCH, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Thomasin Walter le 29 juin 1559, à Mashbury, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 8 février 1575, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William lukynが約1530年にイギリスエセックスグレアト バッドオウで生まれた時，父Geoffrey LUKYNは23歳，母Margaret Matilda FINCHは12歳であった。1559年6月29日にイギリスエセックスマシュブリーでThomasin Walterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1575年2月8日にイギリスエセックスで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William lukyn(이)가 대략 1530년 영국 에세스 그리트 바도에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey LUKYN(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Matilda FINCH(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1559년 6월 29일 영국 에세스 마스h버이에서 Thomasin Walter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1575년 2월 8일 영국 에세스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Thomasin Walter em 29 de junho de 1559, em Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1575, em Essex, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William lukyn родился около 1530 г. в местности грит баддоу, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey LUKYN было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Matilda FINCH, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Thomasin Walter 29 июня 1559 г. в местности машбури, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 8 февраля 1575 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.
